title: Sealapack SAP010-24 Toaster Bag, Plastic, Silver
features: RE-USEABLE: Sealapack Toaster Bags are the perfect kitchen accessory, use daily to prevent bread, bagels or filled muffins from sticking to the toaster

PERFECT TOASTIE: Make perfect toasted sandwiches with no mess in your toaster. Simply make your sandwich, place it in the bag and pop the bag in your toaster. In minutes you will have a perfect toasted sandwich !

HOME & OFFICE USE: Inexpensive option for making a warm toasted sandwich for breakfast or lunch at home or in the office. Experiment with different fillings, try grated cheese with caramelised onion chutney or chilli jam, use smoked thinly sliced chicken or turkey with sliced tomato
CLEAN & HEALTHY: Toaster bags are quick, convenient and clean, no need to add fats or oils to the bag. Wash the bag after use in warm soapy water, allow to dry ready to use again
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 2 RE-USEABL BAGS
description: Product Description Sealapack Toaster Bags are the perfect kitchen accessory, use daily to prevent bread, bagels or filled muffins or from sticking to the toaster. Make perfect toasted sandwiches with no mess in your toaster. Simply make your sandwich, place it in the bag and pop the bag in your toaster. In minutes you will have a perfect toasted sandwich ! Inexpensive option for making a warm toasted sandwich for lbreakfast or lunch at home or in the office. Experiment with different fillings, try grated cheese with caramelised onion chutney or chilli jam, use smoked thinly sliced chicken or turkey with sliced tomato. Toaster bags are quick, convenient and clean, no need to add fats or oils to the bag. Wash the bag after use in warm soapy water, allow to dry ready to use again.
